---
title: Quarto Tech Paper Example
subtitle: My Subtitle
author: 
  - name: John Smith
page-layout: full
metadata:
  doi: 10.1039/dummyurl
categories:
  - Template
  - Technical Paper
---


# Abstract

This landing page a placeholder. It embeds the full PDF of the paper,
the link to supplementary notebooks and link to source code.
One could also embed video, images, and other media.

# Full Paper

```{=html}
<div style="max-width: 1000px;">
  <iframe 
    src="{{< meta title >}}.pdf"
    style="width: 100%; height: 1000px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 0.5rem;"
    allowfullscreen>
  </iframe>
</div>
```

# Citation

```bibtex
@article{doe2026dummy,
  title   = {A Dummy Article for Demonstration Purposes},
  author  = {Doe, John and Smith, Jane},
  journal = {Journal of LaTeX Examples},
  volume  = {42},
  number  = {3},
  pages   = {101--115},
  year    = {2026},
  doi     = {10.1039/dummyurl},
  url     = {https://example.com}
}
```
